name: Deity V-Mic D3 Pro Location Kit
description: The Deity Microphones V-Mic D3 Pro with Location Recording Bundle includes the V-Mic D3 Pro camera-mount shotgun microphone.

features.Key Features :: For On-Camera, Boompole & Handheld Use | For Cameras and Mobile Devices | Internal 51-Hour Rechargeable Battery | Stepless Gain Knob, Bass Roll-Off Switch | Auto-Configuring 3.5mm TRRS Output | Low Noise & Distortion, High SNR | Lightweight Body, Low-Reflection Finish | Detachable Shoe/Pole/Tripod Shockmount | Includes Pistol Grip Shockmount & Cables | Phantom to Plug-In Power XLR Adapter
features.What's in The Box?: Deity Microphones V-Mic D3 Pro Camera-Mount Shotgun Microphone | Rycote Lyre Adjustable Shoe Shockmount | Smart 3.5mm TRRS Coiled Cable | USB Charging Cable | Foam Windscreen
